text:
There once was a little girl named Lily who loved to dance. She would dance whenever she felt happiness, when she felt sad, or even when she was going through her troubles. One day, her beloved ballet teacher, Mrs. Jenkins, passed away unexpectedly. The news shattered Lily's world. 

Her friends and family couldn't believe it, they wondered how such a kind and vibrant soul could leave them. The grief was overwhelming. The days melted into nights for Lily, her usual dance routine fell away with her cherished teacher, and she withdrew into herself.

At her lowest, Lily was sitting alone in her room when she felt a small tap on her shoulder. She turned to see her teddy bear, whom she had grown fond of over the years of teaching. The teddy bear gave her a gentle nudge and hopped onto her lap. "Lily," it said, its voice soft and reassuring as usual.

Feeling comforted, Lily began to sway gently. With each movement
